zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes Katerine Barton於1530年出生在英國薩默塞特巴頓 聖 大衛時，她的父親John Arthur Burton of Hadlow25歲，母親Agnes Mary Holte19歲。她於1551年12月6日與John Aston Stone在英國藍卡爾法爾沃斯結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1597年5月27日在英國英格蘭薩默塞特巴頓享年67歲，埋葬在英國薩默塞特巴頓 聖 大衛。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes Katerine Barton于1530年出生在英国薩默塞特巴頓 聖 大衛时，她的父亲John Arthur Burton of Hadlow25岁，母亲Agnes Mary Holte19岁。她于1551年12月6日与John Aston Stone在英国藍卡爾法爾沃斯结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1597年5月27日在英国英格兰薩默塞特巴頓享年67岁，埋葬在英国薩默塞特巴頓 聖 大衛。

nameMeanings.name: Barton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places called with Old English bere or bær ‘barley’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’, i.e. an outlying grange. Compare Barwick . The name is also found in Ireland, where it has been Gaelicized as de Bartún.

Polish (Bartoń); Czech and Slovak (mainly Bartoň): from a pet form of the personal name Polish Bartłomiej, Czech Bartoloměj, Slovak Bartolomej, from Latin Bartholomaeus (see Bartholomew ). This surname is also found in Germany.

variants.name: Barwick
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Berwick or Barwick, for example in Northumberland, Norfolk, Somerset, and Yorkshire, from Old English bere ‘barley’ + wīc ‘outlying farm building’, i.e. a granary lying some distance away from the main settlement.
North German: habitational name from a place called Berwick, near Soest, in Westphalia.

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

nameMeanings.name: Katerine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: equivalent of   Katherine .  This is a popular form in Russia, which is also occasionally used in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Katherine
meanings: equivalent of   Katherine  , also occasionally used in the English-speaking world.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes Katerine Barton was born in 1530, in Barton St David, Somerset, England, her father, John Arthur Burton of Hadlow, was 25 and her mother, Agnes Mary Holte, was 19. She married John Aston Stone on 6 December 1551, in Farnworth, Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 6 daughters. She died on 27 May 1597, in Barton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 67, and was buried in Barton St David, Somerset, England.

Elle a épousé John Aston Stone le 6 décembre 1551, à Farnworth, Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée le 27 mai 1597, à Barton, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterrée à Barton St David, Somerset, Angleterre.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes Katerine Bartonが1530年にイギリスソメルセトバートン スト ダヴィドで生まれた時，父John Arthur Burton of Hadlowは25歳，母Agnes Mary Holteは19歳であった。1551年12月6日にイギリスランカシュアイアファルンウオルスでJohn Aston Stoneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1597年5月27日にイギリスイギリスソメルセトバートンで67歳で死去し，イギリスソメルセトバートン スト ダヴィドにて埋葬された。

ko.Barton St. David, Somerset, England: 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 바턴 스트 데이비드
ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Katerine Barton(이)가 1530년 영국 서머세트 바턴 스트 데이비드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Arthur Burton of Hadlow(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes Mary Holte(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 1551년 12월 6일 영국 랭카실르 패른워스에서 John Aston Stone(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1597년 5월 27일 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 바턴에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 서머세트 바턴 스트 데이비드에 묻혔다.

ru.Barton St. David, Somerset, England: бартон ст дэвид, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes Katerine Barton родилась в 1530 г. в местности бартон ст дэвид, сомирсет, Англия, её отцу по имени John Arthur Burton of Hadlow было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Mary Holte, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Aston Stone 6 декабря 1551 г. в местности фарнворт, ланкашир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 6 дочерей. Она умерла 27 мая 1597 г. в местности бартон, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 67 лет и была похоронена в местности бартон ст дэвид, сомирсет, Англия.
